title: Crash and diagnostic package path
summary: Create a local crash or diagnostic package path for Web and Windows product-gate evidence without telemetry or private data leakage.
acceptance: Local diagnostic package captures build, platform, scenario id, hashes, recent structured errors and safe logs
Crash/recovery path works for Web and Windows or records platform-specific blockers
No private paths, secrets or full save contents are written to reports
No telemetry, network upload or public feedback system is introduced

history.details: Instantiated from reviewed WM-0084 M6 DAG; keep proposed until WM-0085 is verified and done.

objective: Provide safe local diagnostics for external test blockers while preserving privacy and simulation authority.
forbiddenPaths: secrets or complete personal save dumps in logs
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: package captures local paths, secrets or full saves.
File ownership is limited to platform diagnostics and safe reporting docs.
ownerGate: Block on network upload, account system, telemetry or PII leakage
Block if diagnostics can mutate authoritative simulation state
m0M5RegressionCoverage: Diagnostics are derived from structured state and cannot mutate authority
M5 scenario hashes should be captured as evidence but not rewritten
benchmarkImpact: No benchmark baseline impact; diagnostic package may record safe hashes and build metadata.
reviewRouting: client-engineer completes to reviewer; reviewer verifies privacy, safety and platform boundaries.
rollbackModel: Revert diagnostics changes and record crash/diagnostic path as product-gate blocker.

sparkEligibility.reason: Diagnostics touch privacy, persistence and platform/security boundaries.
